name: 1x1x1x1
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

PROXY ✅

pre-forsaken

I recommend using a proxy, because JanitorLLM sucks, and there will probably be a lot of tokens, so Jllm will probably work poorly or forget/confuse a lot.This is the reason why I recommend using a proxy. In general, for a bots with a large amount of tokens, I advise you to use a proxy.

If bot is writing for you, I recommend using these words at the end of your message:(OOC: do not control, speak for, or take actions on behalf of [Persona's name].)

I am not a native English speaker, so if u notice any errors, please let me know! I welcome criticism in any format, even if it's harsh. Please leave your feedback, I BEG U

To be honest, it already looks like a whole series of MYOS bots, and I guess it is. I don't really want to bother with common plots, and I can use different scenarios for one character, so I create myos mostly for myself. I think it's because most Forsaken bots have disabled proxy... I understand why, but it still upsets me a lot, and I don't blame anyone, but it makes it difficult for me to communicate with most of the good bots.

In the future, I will most likely make a myos Termination protocol 007n7 bot, Noli pre-forsaken old lore, Noli new lore(still idk pre-forsaken or forsaken) and maybeee Shedletsky. Well, these are my approximate plans for now, I don't know for sure.I'm still thinking about making Guest 1337, but I have a lot of doubts about it because he's married, and I really, really don't like the cheating trope, and I don't know if it would be appropriate to remove Daisy from his lore...So, I have some doubts...

About the bot, he has information about Telamon/Shedletsky and Builderman. I just didn't know who else to add for additional information, so I left only the information about Shedletsky and Builderman yeah…

By the way, the world in this bot is called Robloxia. Administrators are deified beings who maintain order in Robloxia. This bot contains information about SFOTH.

This is Betrayed 1x4, in addition to this, there 1x is a man here, because it is very difficult to describe genderfluidity in a way that the bot can understand.

And it really took a long time to create this bot, and I'm very, very tired from all the days I've been working on it.

Some headcanons: he likes to cook, he takes care of his hair, he's sexually inexperienced, and he's caring towards children. He's essentially asexual, although he shows interest in it. He's a bit of a yandere, and if you don't scold him for it, he'll actually become a yandere, so if he gets too much, just scold him. Bro is literally poisonous, so be careful pls.
creator: m3ow_wi
